title: Understanding your CloudDash invoice
content:
CloudDash invoices are generated on the 1st of each month (for monthly plans) or annually on the renewal date (for annual plans).

**Invoice line items:**
- **Base subscription:** Your plan's monthly/annual fee.
- **Pro-rated charges:** Adjustments for mid-cycle upgrades.
- **Add-on services:** Log Aggregation, Extended Retention, Premium Support.
- **Overage charges:** If your resource count exceeded plan limits during the period   (only applicable on metered Enterprise plans).

**Accessing your invoices:**
Settings → Billing → Invoice History. All invoices are downloadable as PDF.

**Payment methods accepted:**
Visa, Mastercard, American Express, and ACH bank transfer (Enterprise only).

**Failed payment handling:**
If a payment fails, CloudDash sends an email notification and retries after 3, 7, and 14 days. After 3 failed retries, the account is suspended (dashboards become read-only; data collection pauses). Account access is restored immediately upon successful payment.

**VAT/Tax:** CloudDash adds applicable VAT/GST for EU and AU customers automatically. To add a VAT ID, go to Settings → Billing → Tax Information.
